description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang syntax checks that runs on every push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow performs syntax checks for various C++ standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) with and without STL, using Clang on ubuntu-22.04, checking out the repository, setting up the environment, running cmake, and executing make.
